abilities.name: clear-body
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokémon. This ability does not prevent any stat losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Speed cut from paralysis. This Pokémon can still be passed negative stat modifiers through Guard Swap, Heart Swap, or Power Swap. This ability functions identically to White Smoke in battle.
abilities.flavorText: Prevents other Pokémon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon's stats.

abilities.name: infiltrator
abilities.shortEffect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves ignore Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.

abilities.name: cursed-body
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.
abilities.effect: Moves that hit this Pokémon have a 30% chance of being Disabled afterward.
abilities.flavorText: May disable a move that has dealt damage to the Pokémon.
